reviews.comment: Coffee Island is a great place for coffee lovers. The ambience is calm and modern, and the coffee tastes fresh and premium. I tried the cappuccino and it was perfectly balanced with a rich aroma. The staff was friendly and the service was quick. Definitely a good spot to relax or work with a cup of coffee..

reviews.comment: There are many coffee shops but I have never tried this much of tasty coffee anywhere this is not just a coffee it's a addiction for me I'm the regular costumer of coffee island, I also visited their churchgate outlate. reviews.comment:
This has become my go to place. I visit every week for their cappuccino. Even the food is absolutely delicious. A must visit cafe.
Special mention for Sayali. Always smiling and happy to help. Very well spoken and makes the whole experience a lot nicer.

reviewReply.comment: Great to know you enjoy visiting us every week for the cappuccino. Happy to hear the experience keeps getting better each time. See you again soon.
